Over time, this builds your **emotional mapping algorithm** —you’ll begin to recognize your clarity windows with precision.

---

## 💡 DECISION RITUALS

| Ritual Name | Action | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| “Wait the Wave” | Delay all major yes/no for at least one full sleep cycle | Prevent snap misalignment |
| “Signal the Surge” | Label the emotion (e.g. “This is a creative high, not truth”) | Detach emotion from meaning |
| “Low Doesn’t Mean No” | Don’t confuse low energy with wrong direction | Protect aligned vision during dips |
| “Neutral Bell” | Create a sound, symbol, or gesture to signal when you feel true neutrality | Anchor clarity into body |

---

## 🎭 CREATIVE FUNCTION OF EMOTIONAL AUTHORITY

Your emotional wave isn’t just personal—it’s creative **fuel**.
